message:
feat: Add NEAR support for JOIN and GROUP BY clauses

Extend NEAR vector similarity syntax from WHERE to JOIN and GROUP BY:

- JOIN: `ON col NEAR col [TOPK n]` for vector similarity joins
- GROUP BY: `GROUP BY NEAR col [TOPK n]` for vector clustering

Changes:
- Add NearJoinCondition and ColumnRef types to AST
- Extend native parser for NEAR in JOIN and GROUP BY
- Implement executeNearJoin() for TOP-K vector similarity joins
- Implement executeGroupByNearQuery() for vector clustering
- Update demo with NEAR JOIN example queries

Default TOPK is 20 for all contexts (WHERE, JOIN, GROUP BY).

files.patch:
@@ -2034,20 +2034,20 @@
+JOIN read_lance('opfs://emoji.lance') e ON i.embedding NEAR e.embedding TOPK 5 +LIMIT 100
+ data-sql="SELECT i.url, i.text, e.emoji, e.description FROM read_lance('https://data.metal0.dev/laion-1m/images.lance') i JOIN read_lance('opfs://emoji.lance') e ON i.embedding NEAR e.embedding TOPK 5 LIMIT 100" + style="background: #059669;">🔗 NEAR JOIN @@ -2853,11 +2853,11 @@

// Default demo dataset URL - LAION 1M images dataset const DEFAULT_DATASET_URL = 'https://data.metal0.dev/laion-1m/images.lance'; - const DEFAULT_QUERY = `-- 🔗 Vector JOIN: Match remote images to local emoji by similarity + const DEFAULT_QUERY = `-- 🔗 NEAR JOIN: Match remote images to local emoji by vector similarity SELECT i.url, i.text, e.emoji, e.description FROM read_lance('https://data.metal0.dev/laion-1m/images.lance') i -JOIN read_lance('opfs://emoji.lance') e ON i.embedding = e.embedding -LIMIT 20`; +JOIN read_lance('opfs://emoji.lance') e ON i.embedding NEAR e.embedding TOPK 5 +LIMIT 100`; // Vault instance for real SQL execution let vaultInstance = null; @@ -6487,14 +6487,14 @@

Searching...

btn.style.background = '#22c55e'; } - // Update SQL with vector JOIN example (only if not silent) + // Update SQL with NEAR JOIN example (only if not silent) if (!silent) { const sqlInput = document.getElementById('sql-input'); - sqlInput.value = `-- 🚀 Vector JOIN: Remote images + Local emoji tags + sqlInput.value = `-- 🚀 NEAR JOIN: Remote images + Local emoji tags by similarity SELECT r.url, r.text, e.emoji, e.description FROM read_lance('https://data.metal0.dev/laion-1m/images.lance') r -JOIN read_lance('opfs://emoji.lance') e ON r.embedding = e.embedding -LIMIT 20`; +JOIN read_lance('opfs://emoji.lance') e ON r.embedding NEAR e.embedding TOPK 5 +LIMIT 100`; document.getElementById('sql-highlight').innerHTML = highlightSQL(sqlInput.value) + '\n'; }
